description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Debt contract. Debtor: Ṣibyān b. Abū Ṣaʿd Efrayim b. Ṣibyān ha-Kohen. Creditor: Abū l-Riḍā Netanel b. Yeshuʿa. Sum: 11 dinars, which Ṣibyān can spend any way he wants. Ṣibyān is probably the grandson of Ṣibyān ha-Kohen b. Seʿadya (active 1040–44). (Information in part from Goitein's index cards.) Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בNLI.
